title: uhhwhydoyoudothatvisualworkbench
description: Fixes an interaction with TMRV and Visual Workbench
body:
[![][cf-shield]][cf-link]

**This is a client only Neoforge mod that fixes an interaction between EMI, TMRV and Visual Workbench.**

E.g if you need 4 items to craft something but 2 of them are already in the crafting table, adding the recipe to the table via EMI doesn't work because it only sees the 2 items in your inventory. This mod simply fixes this by disabling the Visual Workbench JEI plugin and letting EMI handle that.

[cf-shield]: https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1492579?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&label=curseforge&labelColor=black&color=%23F16436
[cf-link]: https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/uhhwhydoyoudothatvisualworkbench
